tool_args.label: Approval of 2025 Committee Work Plan - January 2025
tool_args.raw_text: The Committee will approve the Proposed Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan for 2025 that will address initiatives to be reported on throughout the year.

payload.description: Approval of 2025 Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan

tool_args.label: Review Committee Charter - December 2025
tool_args.raw_text: Annual review of Long Island Committee Charter for Committee revision/approval.

payload.description: Annual review of Long Island Committee Charter

tool_args.label: Winter Track Work Programs - January 2025
tool_args.raw_text: The Committee will be advised of Agency plans to adjust schedules to support construction projects during the Winter of 2025.

payload.description: Advisory on schedule adjustments for Winter 2025 track construction projects

tool_args.label: 2024 Operations Year in Review - February 2025
tool_args.raw_text: A review of the prior year's performance of railroad service will be provided to the Committee.

payload.description: Review of prior year railroad service performance

tool_args.label: Adopted/Financial Plan 2025 - February 2025
tool_args.raw_text: The Agency will present its revised 2025 Financial Plan.

payload.description: Presentation of revised 2025 Financial Plan

tool_args.label: Annual Elevator/Escalator Report - March 2025
tool_args.raw_text: Annual report to the Committee on system-wide availability for elevators and escalators throughout the system.

payload.description: Annual report on system-wide elevator and escalator availability

tool_args.label: 2024 Ridership Report - April 2025
tool_args.raw_text: A report will be presented to the Committee on Agency ridership trends during 2024 based on monthly ticket sales data and the results of train ridership counts conducted by the Agency.

payload.description: Report on 2024 ridership trends based on monthly ticket sales and train ridership counts

tool_args.label: Diversity & EEO Report - 4th Quarter 2024 - April 2025
tool_args.raw_text: Quarterly report to the Committee providing data on key EEO and Human Resources indicators relating to LIRR's Equal Employment Opportunity and Diversity efforts, such as composition of the agency's workforce, new hires, and discrimination complaints.

payload.description: Q4 2024 Diversity and EEO report on LIRR workforce composition, new hires, and discrimination complaints

tool_args.label: Final Review of 2024 Operating Results - May 2025
tool_args.raw_text: The Committee will be advised of Agency key operating performance metrics and indicators.

payload.description: Final review of 2024 key operating performance metrics and indicators

tool_args.label: Summer Service and Summer Trackwork Programs - May 2025
tool_args.raw_text: The Committee will be advised of Agency plans to adjust schedules to support construction projects during the Summer of 2025.

payload.description: Advisory on summer schedule adjustments for construction projects

tool_args.label: Mid-Year Operations Update - July 2025
tool_args.raw_text: The Committee will be advised of Agency key operating performance metrics and indicators for the first half of 2025.

payload.description: Mid-year operations update with key performance metrics for H1 2025

tool_args.label: 2026 Preliminary Budget - September 2025
tool_args.raw_text: Public comment will be accepted on the 2026 Budget.

payload.description: Public comment on 2026 Preliminary Budget

tool_args.label: Safety/Security Update - September 2025
tool_args.raw_text: The agency will provide a comprehensive report on Safety/Security.

payload.description: Comprehensive safety and security update

tool_args.label: 2025 Mid-Year Forecast - September 2025
tool_args.raw_text: The agency will provide the 2025 Mid-Year Forecast financial information for revenue and expense by month.

payload.description: 2025 Mid-Year Forecast for revenue and expense by month

tool_args.label: Fall Track Work Programs - October 2025
tool_args.raw_text: This is to inform the Long Island Committee of the MTA Long Island Rail Road's plans to adjust schedules to support various trackwork programs, Main Line Second Track construction and East Side Access Readiness projects.

payload.description: Fall track work programs including Main Line Second Track construction and East Side Access Readiness projects

tool_args.label: 2026 Preliminary Budget (Public Comment) - October 2025
tool_args.raw_text: Public comment will be accepted on the 2026 Budget.

payload.description: Public comment on 2026 Preliminary Budget

tool_args.label: Thanksgiving Holiday Service - November 2025
tool_args.raw_text: The Committee will be advised of plans to adjust schedules.

payload.description: Thanksgiving holiday service schedule adjustment

tool_args.label: Winter Track Work Programs - Switch Installations West Side Yard - November 2025
tool_args.raw_text: This is to inform the Long Island Committee of the MTA Long Island Rail Road's plan to temporarily adjust schedules for plan to temporarily adjust schedules for a series of Switch Installations in West Side Yard.

payload.description: Winter track work programs including switch installations in West Side Yard

tool_args.label: Proposed 2026 Committee Work Plan - November 2025
tool_args.raw_text: The Committee Chair will present a draft Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan for 2026 that will address initiatives to be reported throughout the year.

payload.description: Presentation of draft 2026 LIRR Committee Work Plan

tool_args.label: 2026 Final Proposed Budget - December 2025
tool_args.raw_text: The Committee will recommend action to the Board on the Final Proposed Budget for 2026.

payload.description: Committee recommendation on 2026 Final Proposed Budget to the Board

tool_args.label: Holiday Service - December 2025
tool_args.raw_text: The Committee will be advised of plans to adjust schedules.

payload.description: Holiday service schedule adjustment

tool_args.label: Approval of 2026 Committee Work Plan - December 2025
tool_args.raw_text: The Committee will approve the Proposed Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan for 2026 that will address initiatives to be reported on throughout the year.

payload.description: Approval of proposed 2026 LIRR Committee Work Plan

tool_args.raw_text: The Committee will be advised of Agency plans to adjust schedules to support construction projects during the Winter.

tool_args.label: Spring Track Work Programs - March 2025
tool_args.raw_text: The Committee will be advised of Agency plans to adjust schedules to support construction projects during the Spring of 2025.

tool_args.raw_text: The Committee will be advised of plans to adjust schedules.

tool_args.label: LIRR Committee Recurring Agenda Items
tool_args.raw_text: The Committee will receive monthly reports on: Performance Metrics, President's Report, Operations Report, Safety Report, MTA Police Report, Finance Reports, Procurements, and meeting minutes approval.

payload.claim_text: The LIRR Committee has recurring monthly agenda items including Performance Metrics Report, Approval of Minutes, Committee Work Plan, President's Report, Operations Report, Safety Report, MTA Police Report, Action Items, Information Items, Finance Reports, and Procurements.
payload.subject: LIRR Committee Recurring Agenda Items

tool_args.label: President's Report description
tool_args.raw_text: A Monthly report will be provided highlighting major accomplishments and progress on key initiatives and performance indicators.

payload.claim_text: The President's Report is a monthly report highlighting major accomplishments, progress on key initiatives, and performance indicators.
payload.subject: President's Report

tool_args.label: Operations Report description
tool_args.raw_text: A monthly report will be given highlighting key operating performance statistics and indicators.

payload.claim_text: The Operations Report is a monthly report highlighting key operating performance statistics and indicators.
payload.subject: Operations Report

tool_args.label: Financial Report description
tool_args.raw_text: A monthly report will be provided that compares the Railroad's actual financial performance against its budget and/or forecast.

payload.claim_text: The Financial Report is a monthly report comparing the Railroad's actual financial performance against its budget and/or forecast.
payload.subject: Financial Report

tool_args.label: Ridership Report description
tool_args.raw_text: A monthly report will be provided that compares actual monthly ticket sales, ridership and revenues against prior year results.

payload.claim_text: The Ridership Report is a monthly report comparing actual monthly ticket sales, ridership and revenues against prior year results.
payload.subject: Ridership Report

tool_args.label: Procurements description
tool_args.raw_text: List of procurement action items requiring Board approval and items for Committee and Board information. The Non-Competitive items will be first, followed by the Competitive items and then the Ratifications. The list will include items that need a 2/3 vote of the Board for approval.

payload.claim_text: Procurements: list of procurement action items requiring Board approval, ordered by Non-Competitive, Competitive, then Ratifications. Some items require 2/3 Board vote.
payload.subject: Procurement reporting

tool_args.label: Police Report description
tool_args.raw_text: MTA Police will highlight the significant police activities incurred during the month reported.

payload.claim_text: MTA Police will highlight the significant police activities incurred during the month reported.
payload.subject: MTA Police Report

tool_args.label: Fall Track Work Programs - Main Line Second Track and East Side Access
tool_args.raw_text: This is to inform the Long Island Committee of the MTA Long Island Rail Road's plans to adjust schedules to support various trackwork programs, Main Line Second Track construction and East Side Access Readiness projects.

payload.claim_text: Fall track work programs will support Main Line Second Track construction and East Side Access Readiness projects.
payload.subject: Fall 2025 track work programs

warnings: claim.routes is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Route arrays should link to route records when supported. Suggested relation: route has_claim claim when the route endpoint resolves exactly.

tool_args.label: West Side Yard Switch Installations
tool_args.raw_text: This is to inform the Long Island Committee of the MTA Long Island Rail Road's plan to temporarily adjust schedules for plan to temporarily adjust schedules for a series of Switch Installations in West Side Yard.

payload.claim_text: Winter track work programs include a series of switch installations in West Side Yard requiring temporary schedule adjustments.
payload.subject: West Side Yard Switch Installations

tool_args.label: Seasonal Track Work Programs described
tool_args.raw_text: The Committee will be advised of Agency plans to adjust schedules to support construction projects during the Winter/Spring/Summer/Fall.

payload.claim_text: Seasonal track work programs (Winter, Spring, Summer, Fall) are scheduled with advisory to the Committee on schedule adjustments for construction projects.
payload.subject: seasonal track work programs

tool_args.label: Safety Report description
tool_args.raw_text: A monthly report will be given highlighting key safety performance statistics and indicators.

payload.claim_text: A monthly Safety Report highlights key safety performance statistics and indicators.
payload.subject: Safety Report

tool_args.label: Action Items description
tool_args.raw_text: Staff summary documents presented to the Board for approval of items affecting business standards and practices.

payload.claim_text: Action Items are staff summary documents presented to the Board for approval of items affecting business standards and practices.
payload.subject: Action Items

tool_args.label: Information Items description
tool_args.raw_text: Materials presented to the Committee for review pertaining to certain agency initiatives and functions.

payload.claim_text: Information Items are materials presented to the Committee for review pertaining to agency initiatives and functions.
payload.subject: Information Items

tool_args.label: Diversity/EEO Quarterly Report description
tool_args.raw_text: Quarterly report to the Committee providing data on key EEO and Human Resources indicators relating to LIRR's Equal Employment Opportunity and Diversity efforts, such as composition of the agency's workforce, new hires, and discrimination complaints. In alternating quarters, the report will include additional information on diversity initiatives.

payload.claim_text: Quarterly Diversity/EEO report provides data on LIRR's workforce composition, new hires, and discrimination complaints. Alternating quarters include additional diversity initiatives information.
payload.subject: Diversity/EEO Report

tool_args.label: LIRR Committee is part of MTA
tool_args.raw_text: The Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan is under Metropolitan Transportation Authority.

tool_args.label: MTA Police is part of MTA
tool_args.raw_text: MTA Police reports to the LIRR Committee.
